prefsnologintext2: Fadlan soo gal si aad u beddesho dookhyadaada.
prefsnologintext2-for-temp-user: Fadlan samee akoon si aad u beddesho dookhyadaada.
prefs-tabs-navigation-hint: Talo: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa furayaasha fallaadhaha bidix iyo midig si aad ugu kala gudubto tab-yada liiska tab-yada.
prefs-sections-navigation-hint: Talo: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa furayaasha Tab iyo Shift + Tab si aad ugu kala gudubto qaybaha dookhyada.
prefs-description-personal: Xakamee sida aad u muuqato, u xirmo, una wada xiriirto.
prefs-memberingroupsdisabled-help: {{GENDER:$2|Adiga}} hadda ma buuxinaysid [[$3|shuruudaha]] xubinimada {{PLURAL:$1|kooxdan|kooxahan}} sidaas darteed ma isticmaali kartid xuquuqaha ay bixiyeen {{PLURAL:$1|iyadu|iyagu}}.
prefs-help-realname:
Magaca runta ah waa dooqasho.
Haddii aad doorato in aan keento, waxaa loo adeegsan karaa mid tilmaama howshaada.
passwordtooshort: Erayada sirta waa in oo ahaadaa ugu yaraan  {{PLURAL:$1|1 xaraf|$1 xarfood}} .
passwordtoolong: Furaha sirta ah kama badnaan karo {{PLURAL:$1|1 xaraf|$1 xarafo}}.
password-substring-username-match: Furahaaga sirta ah waa inuusan ka dhex muuqan magacaaga isticmaale.
password-name-match: Eraygaaga sirta waa in oo ka duwanaadaa magacaaga isticmaalaha
password-login-forbidden: Waxaa laga joojiyey adeegsiga magacaan iyo nambar sirtiisaba.
passwordincommonlist: Furaha sirta ah ee la geliyay wuxuu ku jiraa liiska furayaasha sirta ah ee si aad u badan loo isticmaalo. Fadlan dooro fur sir ah oo ka gaar ah.
prefs-help-yourpassword: Dib u soo celinta akoonka waa la daaray. Ka eeg $1 si aad u hesho dookhyo dheeraad ah.
tog-prefershttps: Mar walba isticmaal xiriir ammaan ah marka aad soo gashan tahay.
prefs-help-prefershttps: Waxaa lahagaajin doonaan dooqaan marka xiga ee aad soo gasho
prefs-user-restoreprefs-info: Soo celi dhammaan dookhyada caadiga ah (dhammaan qaybaha)
yourgender: Qaabkee baad doonayssaa in laguu qeeqo?
gender-notknown: Waxay wax ka beddelaan bogagga wiki-ga
gender-unknown: Haddii lagu soo hadal qaado, barnaamijka waxa uu adeegsan doonaa ereyo nooc dhexdhexaad ah goor weliba ay suuragal tahay
gender-female: Waxa ay wax ka bedeshaa bogagga wikipedia
gender-male: Wuxuu wax ka bedelaa bogagga wikiga
prefs-help-gender:
Ahaysiinta xulashaan waa mid dooqasha ah.
Barnaamijkaan adeegsigiisa waxay qiima u yeelaysaa wadahadalkaada iyo kuwa kale iyadoo bedelaysa habka qofka sida lab ama dheddig.
Macluumadkaan waa mid la wada arkayo.
yourvariant: Nooca luuqadda ee waxa ku jira:
prefs-help-variant: Nooca ama hab qoraalka aad doorbidayso in lagu muujiyo bogagga waxa ku jira ee wiki-kan.
tog-fancysig: Ula dhaqan saxiixa sidii wikitext (iyadoo aan si toos ah loogu xirin boggaaga isticmaale)
prefs-help-signature: Waan in la saxiixaa wadahdalada ku dhaca bogga wadhadalka adigoo adeegsaanaya "<nowiki>~~~~</nowiki>", kaasoo u rogi doona saxiixa iyo waqtiga.
prefs-signature-invalid-warning: Saxiixaaga waxa laga yaabaa inuu dhibaato ku keeno qaar ka mid ah qalabka.
prefs-signature-invalid-new: Saxiixaaga hadda waa aan sax ahayn. Inkastoo aad weli isticmaali karto, ma awoodi doontid inaad beddesho ilaa aad saxdo.
prefs-signature-invalid-disallow: Saxiixaaga hadda waa aan sax ahayn. Ilaa aad saxdo, saxiixa caadiga ah ayaa la adeegsan doonaa marka aad saxiixayso faallooyinkaaga.
badsig: Saxiix cayriin ah oo aan sax ahayn. Hubi calaamadaha HTML.
badsiglength:
Naaneysta aad bey u dheertahay.
Waa in aysan ka badanin $1 {{PLURAL:$1|eray|erayo}}.
badsigsubst: Saxiixaaga waxaa ku jira beddel isku dhex jira (tusaale subst: ama ~~~~).
badsightml: Saxiixaaga wuxuu ka kooban yahay HTML aan sax ahayn ama duugoobay:
badsiglinks: Saxiixaaga waa inuu ku jiraa xiriir ku socda boggaaga isticmaale, bogga wadahadalka, ama waxqabadkaaga wiki-kan. Fadlan ku dar, tusaale ahaan: $1.
badsiglinebreak: Saxiixaaga waa inuu ka koobnaadaa hal sadar oo wikitext ah.
prefs-changeemail: Bedelid ama ka saarista ciwaanka E-mailka
prefs-help-email: E-mail waa wax aad xor u leedahay. laakiin waa loo baahanyahay hadii aad eraysirka badaleesid, markii aad ilaawdo eraygaaga sirta
prefs-help-email-others:
Waxaa kale oo aad u isticmaali kartaa in ee dadka kale kugula soo xiriiraan e-mail ayaga oo isticmaalaayo linki isticmaalahaada ama bogga wadahadalka.
E-mailkaada mala sheegaayo markii ee dadka kale kula soo xiriirayaan.
tog-requireemail: Dir emayllada dib u dejinta sirta kaliya marka labadaba cinwaanka emaylka iyo magaca isticmaalaha la bixiyo
prefs-help-requireemail: Tani waxay hagaajisaa asturnaanta waxayna ka caawisaa ka hortagga emayllo aan la codsan.
noemailprefs: Ku cayim ciwaan iimaylkaaga dookhyada si astaamahan u shaqeeyaan.
emailnotauthenticated: Ciwaankaaga iimaylka weli lama xaqiijin. Ma jiri doono iimayl loo diri doono mid ka mid ah astaamaha soo socda.
emailauthenticated: E-mailkaada waxaa la xaqiijiyay $2 saacadduna ahayd $3.
allowemail: Oggolow isticmaaleyaasha kale inay iimayl ii soo diraan
email-allow-new-users-label: Oggolow iimaylada ka imanaya isticmaaleyaal cusub
prefs-help-email-allow-new-users: Haddii aad doorashadan daarato, isticmaaleyaasha aan ahayn [[{{MediaWiki:grouppage-autoconfirmed}}|si toos ah loo xaqiijiyay]] ayaa kuu soo diri kara iimaylo.
tog-ccmeonemails: Ii soo dir e-mailada aan u diro isticmaalada kale oo koobi ah
email-mutelist-label: Ka mamnuuc isticmaaleyaashan inay ii soo diraan iimayl:
tog-enotifwatchlistpages: Ii soo dir iimayl marka bog ama fayl ku jira liiska aan la socdo la beddelo
tog-enotifusertalkpages: E-mail ii soo dir markii boggayga wadahadalka oo isbedelo
tog-enotifminoredits: Ii soo dir iimayl sidoo kale marka wax ka beddel yar lagu sameeyo bogagga iyo faylasha
tog-enotifrevealaddr: Iigu soo bandhig cinwaankayga e-mailka ah fariimaha wargelinta
prefs-description-rendering: Habee muuqaalka, cabbirka, iyo dookhyada akhriska.
timezone-invalid: Waqti-goob aan sax ahayn ama u dhiganta aan sax ahayn.
imagemaxsize:
Xadid cabirka sawirka:
(ee bogagga cadaynta galalka)
thumbsize-help: Qaar ka mid ah isticmaalayaasha waxaa laga yaabaa inay door bidaan sawir-yaryar ka yar ama ka weyn kan caadiga ah. Cabbirka caadiga ah waa $1 pixels.
tog-norollbackdiff: ha isticmaalin kala duwanaanshaha markii aad dib u soo celisay kadib
tog-showrollbackconfirmation: Muuji fariin xaqiijin ah marka la gujiyo isku xirka dib u celinta
tog-editsectiononrightclick:
Fasax cutub wax ka bedelida hadii batoonka midig ee dooliga
dhag lagu siiyo cinwaanka korkiisa (JavaScript)
tog-editondblclick: wax ka bedel maqaalada labo jeer la riixay (waxaa loo baahanyahay JavaScript)
editfont-style: Wax ku bedel meesha aad dooran kartid fartaada nuuceeda:
tog-forceeditsummary: I'xasuusi markii uusan qoraalkeyga raacsiisnay faahfaahin gaaban
tog-useeditwarning: Iidig markaan ka baxayo wax bedelidda bog ay ku jiraan isbedel aan la haydin
tog-previewonfirst: Horfiirinta itus marka ugu horeeyso oo aan wax ka bedelo
tog-previewontop: Itus horfiirinta kahor sanduuqa wax ka bedelida
tog-uselivepreview: Isticmaal horfiirinta tooska ah (JavaScript) (Wuxuu ku jiraa tijaabo)
recentchangesdays: Tirada maalmaha lagu tusaayo isbedelada dhow:
tog-usenewrc: Isticmaal isbdelada dhowdhow oo la'horumariyey (waxaa loo baahanyahay JavaScript)
tog-hideminor: Qari bedelada yar ee isbedelada dhow
tog-hidepatrolled: Qari wax bedelkii ugu danbeeyay oo la waardiyeeyay
tog-newpageshidepatrolled: Ka qari maqaalada la waardiyeeyay maqaalada kale ee cusub
prefs-watchlist-days: Tirada maalamaha ay ku jirayaan liiska-waardiyaha:
tog-extendwatchlist: Balaari liiska waardiyaha si loo arko dhamaan isbedelada, ma ahan oo kaliya kuwa dhow
tog-watchlisthideminor: Ka qari  bedelyada yar liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchlisthidebots: Ka qari bedelada robotka  liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchlisthideown: Ka qari wax bedelkeyga  liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchlisthideanons: Ka qari isbedelada ee sameeyeen isticmaalada la aqoon liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchlisthideliu: Ka qari isbedelada ee sameeyeen isticmaalada soo gelay liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchlisthidepatrolled: Ka qari isbedelada la waardiyeeyay liiska waardiyaha
tog-watchdefault: Ku dar boggaga aan wax ka bedelo liiskayga waardiyaha
tog-watchmoves: Ku dar boggaga aan wareejiyo liiskayga waardiyaha
tog-watchdeletion: Ku dar boggaga aan tirtiro liiskayga waardiyaha
tog-watchcreations: Ku dar boggaga aan aniga sameeyay liiskayga waardiyaha
restoreprefs: Dib u soo celin qaabeynta (dhammaan qaybaha)
